title: Showcase tour — value shapes, stepping, and inter-block wiring
description: Stages a couple of writable properties, advances the virtual clock, and asserts: the staged values held, the timer-driven metrics moved under stepping, and every ping the signal source sent was delivered to the sink (the inter-block link works). Exercises set, advance, settle (scoped via until), and expect with number / relational {path} / oneOf / boolean comparators.

steps.label: run the timers for four virtual seconds
let the staged setpoint settle (scoped — the ticking metrics don't block it)
the timer advanced the cycle counter
the status enum holds a known member
every ping the source sent reached the sink — the inter-block link works

judge.text: In the UI: every value shape renders (status pill, struct, sparkline, duration, bounded number field, bool toggle); the signal source's pings are all delivered to the sink; the timer-driven metrics advance when stepping.
